MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
The hearing on Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation's motion for summary adjudication was continued on the court's own motion from March 4 to March 8, 2010. No appearance today and tentative ruling adopted: Metalclad's motion for summary judgment has been withdrawn. The only aspect of Metalclad's alternate motion for summary adjudication that remains is issue 6 seeking summary adjudication on the claim for punitive damages, which is granted. Metalclad satisfied its burden of production by presenting plaintiffs' factually devoid responses to contention interrogatories. Plaintiffs have not raised a triable issue by the required standard of clear and convincing evidence. Judge: Harold Kahn, Matter not reported
